latestFeedback.title: latestFeedback
latestFeedback.description: The human-readable feedback text previously retrieved by the Get Learner Latest Feedback action. Passed as context to the prompt template for answer generation.

learnerQuestion.title: learnerQuestion
learnerQuestion.description: The question asked by the learner about their feedback, e.g. 'Why did I fail?' or 'What is my score?' The prompt template uses this to determine which section of analysis to return.

learningrubricId.title: learningrubricId
learningrubricId.description: The Learning_Rubric__c record Id. Used to retrieve the rubric record (guidelines, golden script, passing score) and the latest Attempt record for the prompt template.
